description.value:
The true power of the Kato clan, this hidden technique requires great skill in chakra manipulation and allows its user to transcend their own body. Beginning at 1st level, you may spend 5 Chakra to activate this technique as an action. You create a ghost-like ethereal projection of yourself within 15 feet of your physical body. Your Spirit Form lasts for 10 minutes and requires concentration as if concentrating on a jutsu. You cannot lose concentration as a result of damage to your Spirit Form, but when your physical body takes damage, you must make a concentration check or your Spirit Form ends. You must be able to mold chakra and form hand signs to activate and maintain this technique.

For the duration of your Spirit Form, you control this spiritual projection as if it were you. Your Spirit Form gains the following benefits:

  • Ethereal Movement: You become ethereal and can move through creatures and objects. If you end your turn inside a solid object, such as a wall, you take 2d8 damage. While inside a solid object, you cannot cast jutsu or be targeted by attacks.
  • Normal Functionality: You can take actions, cast jutsu, and use clan and class features as normal.
  • Force Damage: All weapon and unarmed attacks you make deal force damage.
  • Temporary Hit Points: You gain temporary hit points equal to twice your character level + your Wisdom modifier + your proficiency bonus. When these are reduced to 0, you subtract from your Chakra Points as though they were your hit points. When all temp hp and Chakra Points are reduced to 0, this technique ends.
  • Damage Resistance: You have resistance to necrotic, poison, bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.
  • Flying Speed: You gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed + 10 feet and can hover.
  • Condition Immunity: Conditions affecting your physical body do not affect your Spirit Form. Your Spirit Form is immune to all Physical conditions.
  • Healing Restrictions: Your Spirit Form is unaffected by jutsu that would restore hit points or grant temporary hit points.
  • Additional Chakra Damage: You take an additional 2d8 chakra damage when you take chakra damage.

While your Spirit Form is active, your physical body remains motionless and is blinded and deafened. Your Spirit Form can travel up to 120 feet from your physical body. When you start your turn further than this range, both your Spirit Form and physical body take 2d8 psychic damage, which cannot be reduced by any means.

You can end this technique as a free action on your turn or as a reaction when your physical body takes damage.

At 7th level, as your lifeforce grows in tenacity, so too does your Spirit Form. You gain the following enhancements:

  • You can activate your Spirit Transformation Technique as either an action or a bonus action.
  • You double the distance your Spirit Form can travel from your physical body.
  • Your Spirit Form adds twice your proficiency bonus when calculating its temporary hit points.
